titles: Influence Mechanism of Coexisting Ions on the Extraction Efficiency of Lithium from Oil and Gas Field Water | Selective extraction of lithium from alkaline brine using HBTA-TOPO synergistic extraction system | Recovery of lithium from alkaline brine by solvent extraction with β-diketone
feed_relevance: actual oil-and-gas field water plus alkaline-brine mechanism support
best_use: Main Friday case study and current source-regressed Li/Na stage model.
key_data_to_extract: Zhang 2017 direct D_Li/D_Na table, pH/temperature/OA curves, Gando Table 2/4/5, Zhang 2018 mixer-settler data.
current_limitation: Organic ePC-SAFT parameters and true reaction constants remain absent.

titles: Selective extraction of lithium over alkali and alkaline earth ions by synergistic solvent extraction
chemistry_class: cation exchanger plus lithium-selective neutral ligand
feed_relevance: synthetic geothermal brine with Na/K/Mg/Ca competition
best_use: Best backup for multication selectivity and divalent competition story.
key_data_to_extract: Li/Na, Li/K, Li/Mg, Li/Ca separation factors, BuPhen/D2EHDTPA concentration sweeps, van't Hoff fit.
current_limitation: Pure-component and organic-mixture parameters are not available in the repo.

titles: Thermodynamic modeling of lithium extraction from synthetic brine using deep eutectic solvents: A PC-SAFT approach
chemistry_class: DES/TOPO with PC-SAFT organic phase and ePC-SAFT aqueous phase
best_use: Best source for demonstrating parameter-regression and package plumbing.
key_data_to_extract: DES density correlation, PC-SAFT parameters, binary interactions, extraction-isotherm tables.
current_limitation: Not the flagship HBTA/TOPO chemistry and direct LLE smoke remains diagnostic.

titles: Solvent extraction of lithium from brines with high magnesium/lithium ratios: investigation on parameter interactions | Selective separation of lithium from the high magnesium brine by the extraction system containing phosphate-based ionic liquids
best_use: Useful conventional comparator if HBTA/TOPO parameterization stalls.
key_data_to_extract: Fe/Li, HCl, TBP interactions; Li/Mg separation; third-phase/solvent-loss limits.
current_limitation: Acid/Fe handling, corrosion, and chloride speciation complicate IDAES story.

titles: Lithium recovery from shale gas produced water using solvent extraction | Lithium recovery by solvent extraction from simulated shale gas produced water – Impact of organic compounds
feed_relevance: synthetic shale-gas produced water and organic-contaminant follow-up
best_use: Limitation baseline showing why generic solvent extraction is not enough.
key_data_to_extract: Stage-1 divalent removal, Li loss, organic-contaminant impact, TBP/D2EHPA concentration curves.
current_limitation: Low Li recovery/selectivity relative to flagship; current model is placeholder-heavy.

titles: Synergistic Deep Eutectic Solvents for Lithium Extraction
best_use: New candidate for pseudo-component physical-property fitting and capacity comparison.
key_data_to_extract: DES density/viscosity, Li capacity, Li/Na/K selectivity, HBTA/TOPO physical properties.
current_limitation: DES cost/viscosity and chemistry differ from sulfonated-kerosene flagship.

solvent_set: functional ionic liquids for Canadian oil-and-gas produced water
titles: Direct lithium extraction from Canadian oil and gas produced water using functional ionic liquids – A preliminary study
best_use: New alternate because it uses real produced-water samples; keep outside flagship cost story.
key_data_to_extract: Real-water composition, Li recovery/selectivity, extractant loss, viscosity/cost constraints.
current_limitation: Ionic-liquid cost/uncertainty conflicts with current non-ionic pitch.

solvent_set: heteropolyacid ionic liquid + hydrophobic ionic-liquid diluent
titles: Recovery of Lithium Ions from Salt Lake Brine with a High Magnesium/Lithium Ratio Using Heteropolyacid Ionic Liquid
best_use: New high-Mg selectivity candidate and mechanistic contrast to TBP/FeCl3.
key_data_to_extract: Li/Mg selectivity, organic composition, stripping, cyclic stability, extraction constants if tabulated.
current_limitation: Not produced-water specific and not aligned with non-ionic flagship.

titles: Solvent extraction of lithium from aqueous solution using an ammonium ionic liquid
best_use: Mechanism and cost-bound reference for why ionic-liquid systems are not the active pitch.
key_data_to_extract: Distribution ratios, stripping, cation/anion structure, solvent loss and reuse.
current_limitation: Lower fit priority than HBTA/TOPO, Raiguel, or Rezaee for Friday.

titles: Advances in lithium recovery from complex and dilute brines: a comprehensive review
feed_relevance: review reports actual UOG brine; primary record not yet pinned in Zotero
best_use: High-upside historical target if the primary paper/data table can be pinned.
